# Project: minimal-gsd-project

## What This Is

Small fixture repo for horus-spec-driven tests.

## Core Value

Stable fixture for SDK, builder and install smoke tests.

## Requirements

- Node.js
- Python 3.8+

## Current state

- No real app logic
- Minimal `.planning/` substrate only
